name: 赵云壑 己巳（1929）年作 游鱼高花篆书八言联...
inscription:
己巳冬仲之吉，赵云壑。
钤印：赵起之印（白）、云壑子（朱）、怡云禅（朱）

作者简介：
赵云壑　初名龙，改名起，字子云，别署云壑、壑山樵子、泉梅村人、秃尊者。斋名云起楼、还读楼。另有春晖草堂、思寒斋、无休庵。其为吴昌硕弟子。作花卉与书法得吴昌硕嫡传，苍浑秀润，日本人视之为缶庐第二，为海派名家之一。","nonMemberText":"","otherText":"","otherSmallText":"","needMember":0,"show_address_map":0,"name":"description","info_style":1}],"classCodeOne":"020100000000","classCodeOneName":"中国书画","classCodeTwo":"020101000000","classCodeTwoName":"书法","attribute":[{"type":"company","label":"拍卖公司","text":"东京中央","organCode":"JG1329","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0},{"type":"session","label":"拍卖会","text":"东京中央3月春季拍卖2026","organCode":"","sessionCode":"PMH229040","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0},{"type":"special","label":"拍卖专场","text":"中国书画","organCode":"","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"PZ2083720","show_address_map":0},{"type":"text","label":"拍卖日期","text":"2026-03-14 北京时间10:00","organCode":"","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0},{"type":"map","label":"拍卖地点","text":"东京中央艺术空间 东京都中央区京桥3-7-5","organCode":"","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0},{"type":"text","label":"预展时间","text":"2026年3月9日-12日 北京时间9:00-18:00","organCode":"","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0},{"type":"map","label":"预展地点","text":"东京中央艺术空间 东京都中央区京桥3-7-5","organCode":"","sessionCode":"","specialCode":"","show_address_map":0}],"shareMessage":{"title":"【预展中】Lot0168 赵云壑 己巳（ - 雅昌拍卖图录APP","url":"https://m-auction.artron.net/productdetail/art5257760168","pic":"https://thumb.artron.net/Img/image?src=https://image.artron.net/wd/auction/625/art/85244/c3efde0d8e9c93d15373a81a20740c19.jpg&w=80&h=80&c=1","desc":"估价 JPY 50,000-80,000
